payload.answer: Memory rewritten to reflect preference without assuming context. Original ambiguity retained.

entity_resolution.reason: Original statement lacked specificity ('the other one'). Rewrite preserves ambiguity while clarifying the preference relationship.

details: Original memory superseded with clarified but ambiguous statement.

Delete the preference if no longer relevant
